error: Timed out waiting for initial whmi-wri ack. If connect still returns comok but runtime commands such as sendme/get dim do not respond, the panel is probably in a wedged runtime state and public whmi-wri may not be accepted; power-cycle the panel, use the official downloader recovery path, or restore from SD-card TFT.
diagnosis: public whmi-wri initial ack did not appear; the panel is silent even at the public upload entrypoint
